title: Base Processor Configuration
description: Common base schema for preprocessors and postprocessors

kind.description: Type of processor: 'custom' for user-defined processors, 'builtin' for system-provided processors

name.description: Processor identifier used to locate the processor implementation

input.description: Ordered list of input tensor names that the processor's __call__ method receives as positional arguments. These names are used to extract values from the upstream data dictionary. For example, if the upstream provides {'image': img_data, 'text': txt_data, 'metadata': meta} and input is ['text', 'image'], the processor's __call__ method will be invoked as __call__(txt_data, img_data) - extracting values in the order specified by the input list.

output.description: Ordered list of output tensor names corresponding to the tuple returned by the processor's __call__ method. The processor must return a tuple with length equal to the output array length. The returned values are mapped to output names to form a dictionary for downstream consumption. For example, if output is ['embeddings', 'attention_mask'] and __call__ returns (emb_tensor, mask_tensor), the downstream receives {'embeddings': emb_tensor, 'attention_mask': mask_tensor}.
